working_on.feature: Check Exam - Input Flexibility & UI Polish
working_on.task: Completed Text Input option and UI improvements
working_on.notes: Added 'Paste Text' option, improved FileUploader, and added multi-format text parsing logic.

pending_tasks.task: Test with more diverse PDF files to verify edge cases
pending_tasks.notes: Especially PDFs with unusual fonts or complex Vietnamese text

pending_tasks.task: Consider refactoring AnswerSeparator + AnswerValidation logic into a shared hook
pending_tasks.notes: Validation logic is duplicated between AnswerValidation component and CheckExamClient showComparisonView

recent_changes.description: Implemented 'Paste Text' input method for Check Exam with real-time question counting
Improved FileUploader UI to show selected file names, sizes, and a clear/success state
Enhanced text parsing regex to support 'Câu hỏi X:' format and various answer delimiters

errors_encountered.error: FileUploader didn't show uploaded file names
errors_encountered.solution: Added state to track selected files and mapped them in the UI with a clear button.

errors_encountered.error: Text parsing regex didn't match 'Câu hỏi' variant
errors_encountered.solution: Updated regex to handle optional 'hỏi' word: ^(?:Câu\s*(?:hỏi)?\s+)?

decisions_made.decision: Lifting raw text state to parent
decisions_made.reason: Allows state persistence when user navigates back to step 1 (PDF/Text selection).
Text input formats are predictable enough to insert # markers immediately during parsing.
